taskId.description: The ID of the task to update (e.g. "task_1").

status.description: New status. Use 'deleted' to soft-delete the task (it will be excluded from TaskList but remains fetchable via TaskGet).

owner.description: Assign an owner (free-form string, e.g. agent id or human name).

addBlocks.description: Task IDs to append to this task's 'blocks' list (tasks that cannot start until this one finishes).

addBlockedBy.description: Task IDs to append to this task's 'blockedBy' list (tasks that must finish before this one can start).

metadata.description: Metadata keys to merge into the existing metadata bag (existing keys are preserved; matching keys are overwritten).
